speaker: charlie
text: Formula One action kicks off today with the Miami Grand Prix, part of what's shaping up to be a massive May for motorsport. The calendar shows 76 sporting events scheduled across 22 different sports this month.

speaker: alice
text: The Formula One season has been absolutely electric so far, and Miami always delivers some spectacular racing. Plus we've got the Kentucky Derby coming up, NBA Draft action, and some huge UFC events including that Chimaev versus Strickland bout.

speaker: charlie
text: And closer to home, the Helly Hansen Regatta is bringing extra activity to Annapolis this weekend, perfect timing with that beautiful weather we're having. May's turning into one of those months where you need a bigger calendar just to fit all the sport in.
